component.name: Arroxy
component.summary: YouTube downloader for video, audio, and subtitles
YouTube Downloader für Video, Audio und Untertitel
Descargador de YouTube para vídeo, audio y subtítulos
Téléchargeur YouTube pour vidéo, audio et sous-titres
वीडियो, ऑडियो और सबटाइटल के लिए YouTube डाउनलोडर
動画・音声・字幕に対応した YouTube ダウンローダー
Загрузчик YouTube — видео, аудио и субтитры
Завантажувач YouTube — відео, аудіо та субтитри
下载 YouTube 视频、音频和字幕

description.p: Arroxy is a free open-source YouTube downloader built around a simple step-by-step wizard. Paste a URL, pick a format and quality, choose where to save, and download — no command-line flags, no terminal required.

ul.li: Download YouTube videos in up to 4K, 1080p60, and HDR
Extract audio in MP3, M4A, Opus, and other formats
Download subtitles in any language, embedded or as sidecar files
Parallel download queue with real-time progress
Supports YouTube Shorts, playlists, and live archives
Powered by yt-dlp under the hood, kept up to date automatically
Works on Linux, Windows, and macOS

screenshot.caption: Paste a URL to get started

description.p: Initial Flathub release. Download YouTube videos, audio, and subtitles with a wizard UI.
